headline: Which Is the Better Long-Term Buy: iShares' Small-Cap IWM or Invesco's Tech-Heavy QQQ?
summary: QQQ has dominated the past decade, while IWM is still waiting for its turn. Here is how to decide which one belongs in your portfolio.

headline: Invesco (RZG) vs. iShares (IJT): Which Small Cap Growth ETF Is the Better Buy?
summary: RZG delivered stronger 1-year returns at 39.70%, but IJT's lower 0.18% expense ratio and $8.3B in assets offer cost advantages for long-term investors.

headline: Northern Trust Appointed to Support Invesco’s New Index-Tracking Mutual Fund Range
summary: DUBLIN, July 06, 2026--Northern Trust (Nasdaq: NTRS) today announced it has been appointed by Invesco to provide administration, custody and depositary services for its new Irish-domiciled index tracking mutual fund range, Invesco Markets V ICAV.
